name: Condensing Boiler - Model CB-850
description: High-efficiency condensing boiler for heating hot water system
pdf_content:
SUBMITTAL DOCUMENTATION
Project: Academic Building Central Plant

BOILER SPECIFICATIONS
Manufacturer: HeatMaster Technologies
Model Number: CB-850-HE
Type: Condensing Fire-Tube Boiler
Fuel Type: Natural Gas

PERFORMANCE RATINGS
Input Rating: 850,000 BTU/hr
Output Rating: 807,500 BTU/hr
AFUE Efficiency: 95%
Turndown Ratio: 10:1
Minimum Return Water Temperature: 80°F (condensing mode)
Maximum Supply Water Temperature: 180°F
Design Water Flow Rate: 34 GPM
Pressure Drop @ Design Flow: 4.2 ft

COMBUSTION SYSTEM
Burner Type: Premix modulating
NOx Emissions: <20 ppm @ 3% O2
CO Emissions: <50 ppm @ 3% O2
Gas Inlet Pressure: 7" W.C. minimum
Gas Connection: 2" NPT

ELECTRICAL REQUIREMENTS
Power Supply: 115V/1PH/60Hz
Full Load Amps: 8.5A
Control Interface: Modbus RTU
Safety Controls: ASME CSD-1 compliant

PHYSICAL CHARACTERISTICS
Dimensions: 48"W x 36"D x 72"H
Dry Weight: 850 lbs
Water Content: 28 gallons
Vent Size: 4" PVC/CPVC
Combustion Air: 4" PVC

STARTUP CHECKLIST
• Verify gas pressure at inlet
• Check combustion air and vent piping
• Fill and purge hydronic system
• Verify water flow through boiler
• Perform combustion analysis at high and low fire
• Adjust gas/air ratio for optimal combustion
• Test all operating and safety controls
• Verify modulation control signal operation
• Check condensate drain and neutralizer
• Program outdoor reset curve
• Test low water cutoff operation
• Document startup report with all readings

Submitted By: Mechanical Contractor
Date: January 30, 2024
Page 1 of 2
